gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; additionally, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, as career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students lined up outside the university gym, and a welcome announcement outlining the fair schedule played over the PA system, while tech companies displayed demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circled the polished floor; meanwhile, event staff scanned registrations and handed out lanyards at the entrance, and alumni volunteers shared quick pep talks near the coffee station, while consulting firms stacked glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; furthermore, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, at the entrance event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and tech companies are displaying demo screens showing their latest apps; meanwhile, a welcome announcement is outlining the fair schedule over the PA system, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, as event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and healthcare providers are showcasing community outreach photos, and career counselors are reminding attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

Healthcare providers also showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
